creator: blackend@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

These ports are there to build the whole FreeBSD documentation set so 
the documentation build toolchain is required.  If one doesn't want to 
build these ports locally, packages are available.  For more details 
see: 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/updating-upgrading-documentation.html 
(24.4.6.2 Using Documentation Packages and 24.4.6.3 Updating 
Documentation Ports)
